narrative:
Batavia Township I (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,058 registered voters, with 65.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.2 percentage points.
